channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Report alleges political pressure campaign influenced Trump’s Iran peace negotiations and subsequent military actions
item.description: A report cited by Zeteo claims that President Donald Trump faced significant internal and external political pressure surrounding his administration’s efforts to negotiate a potential peace agreement ...

item.title: Democrats Raise Concerns Over Anonymous Republican-Linked PAC Spending in Democratic Primaries
item.description: A report from Punchbowl News describes growing concerns among Democratic lawmakers about the emergence of anonymous and difficult-to-trace super PACs that are spending heavily in Democratic primary el...

item.title: Novo Nordisk lowers Ozempic costs for uninsured Canadians after generic semaglutide launches
item.description: Novo Nordisk announced that some Canadians will soon be able to purchase brand-name Ozempic at a reduced price following the arrival of generic semaglutide products in Canada. The company said eligibl...

item.title: Jet2 confirms stable summer flight operations despite fuel supply concerns
item.description: Jet2 has issued a reassuring update to passengers regarding concerns about possible summer holiday flight cancellations, stating that it expects its flight schedule to operate normally throughout the ...

item.title: Eni Accelerates Baleine Offshore Expansion Project in Ivory Coast Amid Stronger Oil Prices
item.description: Italian energy company Eni is moving to accelerate the expansion of its offshore Baleine oil and gas project in Ivory Coast, a development estimated to cost approximately $4 billion. The company said ...

item.title: Trump’s Endorsement of Ken Paxton Deepens Divisions Within Texas Republicans
item.description: A growing conflict within the Texas Republican Party has intensified after President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over longtime Senator John Cornyn in the state’s Republican...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues Trump’s Recent Actions Are Increasing Political and Public Backlash
item.description: This opinion article by Jason Miciak argues that President Donald Trump has entered a politically dangerous phase in which his recent actions are testing the limits of public and institutional toleran...

item.title: Ontario Extends Alcohol Service Hours for FIFA World Cup While B.C. Keeps Existing Rules
item.description: Ontario and British Columbia, the two Canadian provinces hosting matches during the FIFA World Cup 2026, are taking different approaches to alcohol service hours during the tournament. Ontario Premier...

item.title: Driver and two accomplices arrested in Edo over alleged diversion and attempted sale of company truck
item.description: Operatives of the Edo State Security Corps have arrested a driver, Muhammed Magaji, alongside two alleged accomplices, Muhammed Bashir and Abba Abubakar, over claims that they tried to divert and sell...

item.title: Sally Ride: Biography of the First American Woman in Space and NASA Career Highlights
item.description: The article presents a retrospective look at Dr. Sally Ride, an American physicist, astronaut, and educator who became the first American woman to travel into space. Born in Los Angeles in 1951, Ride ...

item.title: Jeanne Klein, 1950s Fashion Model and Muse of Mid-Century Couture Photography
item.description: Jeanne Klein was a French-American fashion model who rose to prominence in the 1950s and became widely recognized for her refined beauty, elegance, and strong presence in high-fashion photography. She...

item.title: Senator Lito Lapid Confirms He Will Remain Part of the Senate Minority Bloc
item.description: Senator Lito Lapid confirmed that he plans to remain with the minority bloc in the Senate, according to a report published by ABS-CBN News on May 26, 2026. The article briefly highlighted Lapid’s posi...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Launches Park-and-Ride Parking Project at BRT Stations
item.description: Dar es Salaam regional authorities have announced a new project to construct parking facilities at key bus rapid transit (BRT) stations across the city in an effort to improve urban transport and redu...

item.title: Backchannel meeting focused on Imran Khan’s jail access and easing political tensions
item.description: A meeting held on May 14 at the Islamabad residence of PTI Chairman Barrister Gohar Ali Khan has triggered political discussion after reports emerged that Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi and Khyber Pak...

item.title: Record May Heatwave Raises Concerns About Europe’s Readiness for Extreme Temperatures
item.description: The article examines the unusually high temperatures affecting the United Kingdom and several parts of Europe during a record-breaking May heatwave. It highlights how the UK has experienced exceptiona...

item.title: Indian Army restores connectivity in Wayanad with rapid construction of Bailey bridge after landslides
item.description: The Indian Army has successfully constructed a 190-foot-long Bailey bridge in Wayanad district, Kerala, to restore connectivity between severely affected regions following devastating landslides. The ...

item.title: Thomas Massie files 2028 candidacy paperwork, sparking speculation about future political plans
item.description: Representative Thomas Massie, a Republican from Kentucky and frequent critic of former President Donald Trump, has sparked renewed political speculation after filing paperwork with the Federal Electio...

item.title: Former GOP strategist criticizes Trump and MAGA influence on the U.S. military
item.description: Steve Schmidt, a former Republican political strategist and co-founder of The Lincoln Project, issued strong criticism of former President Donald Trump and the MAGA movement during Memorial Day reflec...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Continued Heavy Rains and Flood Risk Across Several Regions
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a weather advisory warning Kenyans to prepare for continued rainfall, strong winds, and possible flooding in several parts of the country between May 26 ...

item.title: Andrew Keegan says acting residual payments from his past television and film roles are often very small
item.description: Actor Andrew Keegan, best known for playing Joey Donner in the 1999 teen film 10 Things I Hate About You, has spoken openly about the unpredictable and often minimal residual payments he still receive...
